name: aerocap-agent-kit
description: AeroCap Agent Development Kit — 5-layer Claude Code infrastructure for the AeroCap multi-tenant pilot training SaaS platform.
author: AeroCap Engineering

memory.description: CLAUDE.md — project architecture rules loaded automatically in every session

skills.description: Knowledge layer — auto-matched domain rules, code templates, and subagent context briefs

commands.name: generate-microservice
commands.description: Scaffold a complete production-ready AeroCap microservice

commands.name: cbta-schema
commands.description: Generate CBTA competency evaluation schema + TypeScript types + DB migration

commands.name: openapi-spec
commands.description: Generate a complete OpenAPI 3.0 spec from a feature description

commands.name: review-tenant-isolation
commands.description: Audit code for multi-tenant data isolation violations

hooks.description: Guardrail shell scripts — enforced automatically by Claude Code
guards: Blocks: rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force push, production ops, .env writes
Runs co-located Jest tests after file edits
Session banner with environment status on startup

subagents.description: Specialist agents for delegated work — each runs in its own context window

agents.name: spec-generator
agents.description: Generates OpenAPI specs, DB schemas, and TypeScript types from feature descriptions

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Reviews code for multi-tenant isolation, security, and AeroCap architectural compliance

agents.name: test-runner
agents.description: Writes Jest unit + integration tests including mandatory tenant isolation tests

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.description: Full OWASP Top 10 + GDPR compliance audit for any code change

agents.name: frontend-developer
agents.description: Senior React/Next.js developer — builds pages, components, forms, and dashboards for the AeroCap portal

agents.name: compliance-auditor
agents.description: Multi-jurisdiction data protection compliance: GDPR, PIPL, DPDP Act, CCPA/CPRA, POPIA — audits code, schemas, and data flows

plugins.description: Distribution layer — install script for new team members

workflow.description: Standard AeroCap feature delivery pipeline using the ADK
steps: 1. Describe the feature in plain language
2. Run /openapi-spec to generate the API contract
4. Hooks auto-lint and run tests on every file write
5. Spawn test-runner subagent to write missing test cases
7. Spawn security-auditor for release gate audit
8. Spawn code-reviewer for final merge approval
